commands.girlfriends.affection.not_a_gir: The specified entity is not a Girlfriend character
message.girlfriends.invite_home_failed: Failed to invite home. Please check if your respawn point is a double bed.
message.girlfriends.invite_home_no_respa: Please set your respawn point before inviting home.
girlfriends.gift.disliked: It seems that %1$s doesn't like your gift, affection %2$s
girlfriends.gift.daily_cap_reached: %1$s doesn't want any more gifts today...
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.favorite.min: <Momo> This is... honeycomb? Thank you. The bees will be happy too.
<Momo> You remembered I like this... Mm, I'll treasure it.
<Momo> The scent of honeycomb always reminds me of the quietest afternoons in the garden. Thank you.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.favorite.gir: <Momo> Such a beautiful bouquet... You picked each flower carefully, didn't you?
<Momo> When flowers gather together, it's like they're whispering secrets. From now on... can I whisper secrets with you too?
<Momo> This bouquet will never wither—because it's from you. I'll tend to it forever.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.liked.0: <Momo> You always manage to pick things that touch my heart.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.liked.1: <Momo> Thank you. This will help me tend the garden.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.liked.2: <Momo> Mm, I like it. Let's use it in the greenhouse.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.liked.3: <Momo> The things you give... they all carry such a gentle feeling.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.liked.4: <Momo> I'll take it. Next time you come to the garden, you'll see it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.liked.5: <Momo> These go so well with flowers. Thank you for thinking of this.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.liked.6: <Momo> With this, life in the garden has one more thing to look forward to.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.liked.7: <Momo> It seems you know what I like better than I do now.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.accepted.0: <Momo> Thank you, I'll put it to good use.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.accepted.1: <Momo> Mm, I accept it. You're always so thoughtful.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.accepted.2: <Momo> Though I don't usually use these... since it's from you...
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.accepted.3: <Momo> Thanks. Every time you visit, this place feels a little warmer.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.accepted.4: <Momo> This is a thoughtful gift. I'll remember it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.accepted.5: <Momo> Mm, I'll keep it in the storage. It'll come in handy for the garden someday.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.rejected.0: <Momo> Mm... I'm not sure how to use this in the garden...
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.rejected.1: <Momo> Thank you for the thought. But the flowers and bees probably don't need this.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.rejected.2: <Momo> Maybe it'd be better to give it to someone who needs it more?
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.rejected.3: <Momo> I've received your kindness. It's just... it doesn't have a place in my garden.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.disliked.0: <Momo> This... will hurt my flowers. Please take it away.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.disliked.1: <Momo> I don't like things like this. It reminds me of the sound of petals being torn by a storm.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.disliked.2: <Momo> Flowers are delicate. They can't bear things like this...
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.disliked.3: <Momo> Maybe you don't understand, but the garden has no need for things that wither and rot.
girlfriends.gift.quote.momo.disliked.4: <Momo> Please take it back. The scent of decay will lead the bees astray.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.favorite.min: <Yuxi> Another nautilus shell... The sea it has heard—is it the same one I've listened to?
<Yuxi> Thank you. I'll place it on the lighthouse windowsill, so it can keep listening to the tides.
<Yuxi> The spirals on this shell are perfectly intact. Did you find it somewhere far away?
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.liked.0: <Yuxi> Mm, this is good. Thank you.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.liked.1: <Yuxi> You know what I like. That's rare.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.liked.2: <Yuxi> Out on the sea, this is the most practical. I'll take it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.liked.3: <Yuxi> When the tide recedes, it leaves good things on the sand. This you picked is one of them.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.liked.4: <Yuxi> Thanks. Let's bring it along next time we set sail.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.liked.5: <Yuxi> No need for many words. You give it, I take it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.liked.6: <Yuxi> Mm, it's stowed in the cabin.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.liked.7: <Yuxi> Some things don't need long choosing. One glance, and you know they're good. Like this.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.accepted.1: <Yuxi> Mm, it might come in handy during the voyage.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.accepted.2: <Yuxi> Alright. It's in the dock chest.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.accepted.3: <Yuxi> Your kindness—the tides will help me remember it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.accepted.4: <Yuxi> Thank you. Sometimes things from the shore are almost as interesting as things from the sea.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.accepted.5: <Yuxi> I'll take it. I may not talk much, but I understand your feelings.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.rejected.0: <Yuxi> This... I don't know what it could do on the boat.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.rejected.1: <Yuxi> The waves wash away what isn't needed. This, too.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.rejected.2: <Yuxi> Perhaps it's not that it's bad. It just has no fate with the sea.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.rejected.3: <Yuxi> Thank you. But space on the boat is small—every inch has its purpose.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.disliked.0: <Yuxi> Take it back. Things like this shouldn't appear by the sea.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.disliked.1: <Yuxi> The sea wind tells me this is nothing good.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.disliked.2: <Yuxi> It will pollute the shore. Please take it away.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.disliked.3: <Yuxi> I don't like it. Things from the sea have keener instincts than they appear—they hate this too.
girlfriends.gift.quote.yuxi.disliked.4: <Yuxi> Things like this... will make the schools of fish swim the other way.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.favorite.m: <Meishu> Iron ingot. Pure composition. You know your stuff.
<Meishu> Good iron. A good start. I'll take it.
<Meishu> This is the most valuable thing I've received today. Including what I mined myself.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.liked.1: <Meishu> Taken. Can be used next time the furnace is lit.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.liked.4: <Meishu> This is serious stuff. More useful than the words you say.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.liked.6: <Meishu> This kind of thing is useful. Unlike those flashy but useless decorations.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.liked.7: <Meishu> Another good material. Your judgment is more reliable than most.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.accepted.1: <Meishu> Alright. Can find a use for it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.accepted.2: <Meishu> Not the best material, but not useless either. Thank you.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.accepted.3: <Meishu> Leave it there. We'll see later.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.accepted.4: <Meishu> Fine enough. At least you didn't come empty-handed.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.accepted.5: <Meishu> Might come in handy someday. That's how materials are—useless now, not necessarily later.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.rejected.0: <Meishu> This thing has no hardness. I have no use for it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.rejected.1: <Meishu> Material quality is too poor. You keep it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.rejected.2: <Meishu> Can't go in the furnace. Can't be forged. No use to me.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.rejected.3: <Meishu> Maybe you don't know what good material is. Next time I'll tell you.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.disliked.0: <Meishu> Take it away. This doesn't deserve to be in my chest.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.disliked.1: <Meishu> I've spent my life with flames and anvils—this isn't even scrap.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.disliked.2: <Meishu> Flashy and useless. I hate things that catch the eye but do nothing.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.disliked.3: <Meishu> Don't put this near the anvil. It will taint it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.meishu.disliked.4: <Meishu> I'd rather have a piece of gravel than this.
<Wanying> Blaze rod! Whoa, did you snatch this from a blaze? Nice.
<Wanying> Hot enough, bright enough. That's why I like it—just like you.
<Wanying> One more blaze rod, and my blade gains another edge of flame. Thanks, partner.
girlfriends.gift.quote.wanying.liked.0: <Wanying> Good stuff! Hard currency on the battlefield.
girlfriends.gift.quote.wanying.liked.1: <Wanying> Alright, I like practical things. I'll take it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.wanying.liked.2: <Wanying> Ha, good eye. This kind of thing can save your life in a fight.
girlfriends.gift.quote.wanying.liked.3: <Wanying> Straightforward. Not like those roundabout things.
girlfriends.gift.quote.wanying.liked.4: <Wanying> With equipment like this, charge up front with me next time. Beside me, not behind me.
girlfriends.gift.quote.wanying.liked.5: <Wanying> Perfect timing. Just ran short after the last battle.
girlfriends.gift.quote.wanying.liked.6: <Wanying> Fighting isn't a solo game—good gear matters more. Thanks, mate.
girlfriends.gift.quote.wanying.liked.7: <Wanying> Huh. I think you pick weapons better than I do. Let's go pick some together next time.
<Wanying> Not combat supplies, but useful for daily life.
<Wanying> Alright, in the supply bag it goes.
<Wanying> Something from you—I won't throw it away. Rest easy.
<Wanying> Thanks. Though I'd rather see you alive on the battlefield.
<Wanying> Days without battle need these too. I get it.
<Wanying> This won't help on the battlefield. You keep it.
<Wanying> Not hard enough. Not sharp enough. Not fast enough. Not my style.
<Wanying> Maybe you've got the wrong idea—I'm not the type who likes little trinkets like this.
<Wanying> If you're trying to make me happy, wrong approach. Next time just challenge me to a fight.
<Wanying> Cold, soft, edgeless things—I don't need them. Take them.
<Wanying> Things like this remind me of those who gave up the fight. Don't let me see it.
<Wanying> I'd rather face ten blazes than touch this.
<Wanying> You thought I needed this? No. I earn my own warmth.
<Wanying> Combat taught me one thing: the most dangerous thing isn't blades—it's things that make people soft. Take it back.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.favorite.m: <Youruo> Ender pearl. Observation: extremely high integrity. Conclusion: you were very careful during collection. I'm very satisfied.
<Youruo> Every ender pearl contains the coordinate data of a non-Euclidean space. This one's data is very clear. Thank you.
<Youruo> Hypothesis: when you picked this, you already knew I'd like it. Verification—I've already smiled. You didn't see?
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.liked.0: <Youruo> Observation complete: this is a high-quality sample. Accepted.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.liked.1: <Youruo> Interesting. It has relevance to my current research. Thank you.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.liked.2: <Youruo> Inference: you knew I needed this. Data point matches.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.liked.3: <Youruo> Plus one experimental material. Your understanding of my research topic is improving.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.liked.4: <Youruo> Conclusion: can be used for reference. I'll record it in the experiment log.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.liked.5: <Youruo> Hypothesis confirmed: the longer I spend with you, the higher the quality of samples received.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.liked.6: <Youruo> This can advance phase 3 of my spatial leap research. You probably don't know that, but it's very important.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.liked.7: <Youruo> Another one on the lab shelf. Those empty shelves that had no use... you've helped me fill almost half of them now.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.accepted.0: <Youruo> Receipt confirmed. Logged in the experiment record.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.accepted.1: <Youruo> Not essential for research, but consumable in daily experiments. Thank you.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.accepted.2: <Youruo> Observation result: there's room for optimization. But it's usable.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.accepted.3: <Youruo> Received. Every experiment needs auxiliary materials—are you my auxiliary material supplier now?
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.accepted.4: <Youruo> Perhaps a future experiment will use it. Archiving for now.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.accepted.5: <Youruo> Before data is verified, I won't make too many judgments. But... thank you.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.rejected.0: <Youruo> This has no correlation with the current research direction.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.rejected.1: <Youruo> Temporarily no scenario where I can use it. Suggest you reallocate.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.rejected.2: <Youruo> Insufficient data... unable to determine use. But currently, the experiments don't need it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.rejected.3: <Youruo> Perhaps it's not your fault—its physical properties simply have no reference value for my research.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.disliked.0: <Youruo> Conclusion: high-entropy substance. It will contaminate the experimental environment. Please remove it.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.disliked.1: <Youruo> Chaos and disorder are catastrophic for precision experiments. You should be able to understand that, right?
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.disliked.2: <Youruo> Do not place this near the research bench. It will introduce irreversible noise into the data.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.disliked.3: <Youruo> Perhaps it has value elsewhere—but in my laboratory, it is a confounding variable.
girlfriends.gift.quote.youruo.disliked.4: <Youruo> Your kindness and this item's inherent properties are two separate things. I've received the kindness; please take the item away.
